scenario: Northstar Analytics market entry into UK mid-market logistics

sources.claim: Operations leaders lose 6 to 10 hours each week reconciling shipment exceptions across carrier portals.
Three of five interviewees would pilot below GBP 60 per operations seat each month.
Security review and carrier data residency are purchase blockers for two larger prospects.
RouteBoard lists its comparable plan at GBP 79 per operations seat each month.
RouteBoard claims a 40 percent reduction in exception resolution time without publishing its methodology.
UK logistics teams generally standardize on a single carrier portal.
The internal pilot connected three carrier feeds and reduced manual reconciliation steps from seven to four.

contradictions.note: Interview pilot willingness is below the competitor list price; it does not establish willingness to pay GBP 79.
The stale analyst note conflicts with current interviews describing several carrier portals.
